name: ETI International, Inc.
summary: ETI International, Inc., also known as Evolutionary Technologies International, provides software solutions for data integration applications. The company's products include ETI integration design studio, which provides access to base development and management platform for creation and maintenance of data integration interfaces; ETI impact analyst, which collects and analyzes metadata; and ETI data systems libraries and accelerators, which deliver codes, scripts, documentation, and metadata for interface applications. Its solutions also assist in business intelligence, legacy data migration, enterprise data warehouse, customer relationship management, e-business, systems integration, clickstream analysis, and enterprise resource planning services. The company serves clients in financial services, retail, utilities, insurance, manufacturing, government, and transportation industries. ETI International was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
